    root_y = find(y)

        @rank[root_x] += 1
      end
    end
  end

    roots.size

class DSU
  def initialize(n)

      @parent[x] = find(@parent[x])
    end
    @parent[x]
  end

  def union(x, y)
    root_x = find(x)
    root_y = find(y)
    return if root_x == root_y

    if @rank[root_x] < @rank[root_y]
      @parent[root_x] = root_y
    else
      @parent[root_y] = root_x
      if @rank[root_x] == @rank[root_y]
        @rank[root_x] += 1
      end
    end
  end

  def get_components
    roots = Set.new
    (0...@parent.length).each do |i|
      roots.add(find(i))
    end
    roots.size
  end
end

def solve(n : Int64, edges : Array(Array(Int64)), k : Int64) : Int64
  max_w = edges.map { |e| e[2] }.max

  high = max_w

      end
    end
    components = dsu.get_components
    if components <= k
      high = mid
    else
      low = mid + 1
    end
  end
  low
end

        root_y = find(y)
        return if root_x == root_y

        if @rank[root_x] < @rank[root_y]

        else
            @parent[root_y] = root_x
            if @rank[root_x] == @rank[root_y]
                @rank[root_x] += 1
            end
        end
    end

    def get_components
        roots = Set.new
        (0...@parent.size).each do |i|
            roots.add(find(i))
        end
        roots.size
    end
end

def solve(n: Int64, edges: Array(Array(Int64)), k: Int64) : Int64
    max_w = if edges.empty?
        0
      else
        edges.map { |e| e[2] }.max
      end

    high = max_w
    while low < high
        mid = (low + high) / 2
        dsu = DSU.new(n)
        edges.each do |e|
            if e[2] <= mid
                dsu.union(e[0], e[1])
            end
        end
        components = dsu.get_components
        if components <= k
            high = mid
        else
            low = mid + 1
        end
    end
    low
end
